channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-09
item.description:
Our community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects recently. In the realm of statistical analysis, MicheleNuijten's `statcheck` project received administrative updates, while Gilad Feldman's `docpluck` made significant fixes, including recovering residual shapes and updating documentation. Meanwhile, Davidvandijcke's `coarse` project synchronized its "dev" and "main" branches by re-enabling Fable 5 in the model picker. Notably, `escicheck` was updated to align with the `escicheckapp` repository, reflecting the interconnected nature of our projects. Additionally, `auto-zcurve` and `output-it-forward` saw updates, including a revised validation note with a citation and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link, respectively, demonstrating the community's commitment to refinement and accessibility. These developments highlight the collaborative spirit and ongoing efforts to enhance our open-source research tools.

52 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck26 commits
metacheck18 commits
regcheck3 commits
statcheck2 commits
coarse2 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where administrative updates were made. As stated in the commit message, "admin updates" were performed, but the specifics of these updates are not detailed. The branch was then merged into itself, as indicated by the message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages. The changes were made by MicheleNuijten. The commit messages do not provide further information on the nature of the administrative updates.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
